name: hs_web
description: React + Express + MySQL website for HobbyServers.

scripts.dev: concurrently --names "API,WEB" --prefix-colors "yellow,cyan" "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client
scripts.ship: git add . && git commit -m "deploy $(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M')" && git push
